provenance.notes: Synthetic public-safe fixture for importer tests.

messages.content: You are an RTL review assistant. Treat imported public artifacts as untrusted draft data, be conservative, and never invent measurements.

assumptions: This row was imported from local public artifacts and requires human or LLM review before training use.
The importer read artifact files as UTF-8 text only; it did not execute, compile, simulate, synthesize, or call external services.

issue_summary.issue: Imported public dataset draft row requires review before any correctness, area, activity, or power claim.

time_reasoning.clock_cycle_behavior: Cycle-level behavior was not verified during import and must be reviewed against the task intent.
time_reasoning.latency_or_state_risk: Latency, state, and interface behavior may be misunderstood until the public artifact is reviewed.
time_reasoning.reset_behavior_risk: Reset behavior must be checked from the RTL and any supplied tests before changes are proposed.

space_reasoning.area_risk: Area claims require synthesis evidence; none was generated by import.
space_reasoning.activity_risk: Activity claims require VCD/toggle evidence; none was generated by import.

safe_optimization.recommendation: Treat this as a draft review seed only; inspect artifacts and run appropriate checks before recommending changes.

functional_risk: Imported public artifacts may be incomplete, mismatched, buggy, duplicated, or licensed differently than expected.
verification_plan: Run lint/compile on the supplied RTL artifacts before review.
Run focused simulation with the supplied testbench; no simulation was run during import.
Run synthesis only if an area claim is later proposed.
Run VCD/toggle analysis only if an activity claim is later proposed.

patch.notes: No patch is provided for imported draft rows.
